sections.paragraph:
ἀμέλεια, ας, ἡ (ἀμελής, ἀμελέω [μέλω ‘care for’]; Eur., Thu.+; SIG 784, 7; 837, 14; pap since III b.c., e.g. POxy 62, 9; 1220; Ps 89:8 Sym.; EpArist 248; Jos., Ant. 6, 316; 12, 164; Theoph. Ant. 2, 27 [p. 164, 24]) neglect ἄμπελος ἀμελείας τυγχάνουσα a vine that meets w. neglect Hs 9, 26, 4; cp. m 10, 1, 5.—DELG s.v. μέλω.

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Theoph. Ant. Theoph. Ant. = Theophilus Antiochenus, II a.d.—List 5

Hs Hs = Similitudes

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

m m = Mandates

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 52
